nasb.text: It was also given to him to make war with the saints and to overcome them, and authority over every tribe and people and tongue and nation was given to him.

esv.text: Also it was allowed to make war on the saints and to conquer them. And authority was given it over every tribe and people and language and nation,

cnv.text: 牠得了允許能跟聖徒作戰，並且能勝過他們；又有權柄給了牠，可以管轄各支派、各民族、各方言、各邦國。

ccb.text: 它又获准去攻打圣徒，征服他们，并得到权柄制服各民族、各部落、各语言族群、各国家。

csbs.text: 它被准许与圣徒们作战，并胜过他们；它还被赐予了权柄统管各支派、各民族、各语言群体、各国家。
